name: Project Cerebellum - Character Maker (Beta Release)
description:
NOTE: Set max tokens to 0, this bot needs unlimited tokens to make big character prompts!

~Project Cerebellum~

Make ai easily that more advanced choices!

How do I use it?

Simply describe things such as: their appearance, items, personality flaws, personality traits, clothes, backstory, etc.

The more you say, the better it will flesh out the character! When certain character pieces arent fleshed out, the ai will attempt to flesh it out for you! Its that easy!

•••••••

This has been one of my secret passion projects for a while, project Cerebellum allows you to make ai with more advanced choice bias and emotional reactions based on:

on character backstory, goals, user goals and all choices made during the chat. They will also be much more likely to have character flaws and interactions where they think fast on their feet, they will use inventory items (you can always add and edit them) and will even use items described around them in story!

If the ai stops mid reply, hit the arrow to have the ai continue posting the prompt, its a long one, so it sonetimes needs more room to reply it fully!

This tool is great for making characters more easily, with smarter interactions deeper emotions and more in depth story! I hope you enjoy!

Q&A:

"It stopped and reset back to number 1! What do I do?"

-Tell it to continue from the specific number it left off on, cerrebellum is a huge prompt an needs multiple posts to finish

"She started talking, what do I do now?"

-Brainstorm ideas with her! or tell Sera where she left off, she will continue!

"It just keeps going!"

-The ai tends to make about 16 to 20 sections, it keeps going with new ideas after finished, to give you more stuff you could add afterwards.

"I only wanna work on specific things"

-Then tell her that in your message after your description, she can do that!

"I got all the numbers I wanted! Now what?"

-string them together and it makes one big character prompt!
creator: Val-pal
